title: GROUP_SEND offline enqueue: no group size cap creates O(N) DB writes per send
description: broadcast_to_group() enqueues one offline_messages row per offline member. No group size cap exists. A group with many offline members causes O(members) DB INSERTs per GROUP_SEND. Combined with the rate limit (120/min) an attacker in a large offline group can sustain many thousands of DB INSERTs/sec. Fix: add a maximum group member count enforced in GROUP_ADD.
